sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57587" key="kissoste/fanos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσο-στέφᾰνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n57587.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivy-crowned</tr_>, of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
